output_summary: Acknowledged workflow start; proceeding to analysis step (Kowalski).
Initialized workflow: Fix match click pending issue in matches-sorted-by-time.tsx
Found issue: getLiveMatchSpecialRoute returns incomplete path without locale prefix
Navigation system uses next-intl with auto locale prefix. Router from shared/components/navigation handles locale automatically. Issue must be elsewhere.
ROOT CAUSE: createNavigation missing pathnames config. Middleware has it, navigation.ts does not. This causes router.push to generate wrong URLs.
APPROVED: Add pathnames to createNavigation in navigation.ts. Single file change, no dependencies, fixes routing bug.
Added pathnames import and config to createNavigation. Now matches proxy.ts middleware config.
